'''javusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantioselection|enantioselection]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantioselection|enantioselection]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| javusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jævisith|jævisith]] || [[word:jævisij|jævisij]] || [[word:jævisish|jævisish]] || [[word:jævisi|jævisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:javuvusuth|javuvusuth]] || [[word:javuvusuj|javuvusuj]] || [[word:javuvusush|javuvusush]] || [[word:javuvusu|javuvusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:javusuth|javusuth]] || [[word:javusuj|javusuj]] || [[word:javusush|javusush]] || [[word:javusu|javusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:javufsuth|javufsuth]] || [[word:javufsuj|javufsuj]] || [[word:javufsush|javufsush]] || [[word:javufsuf|javufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:javusuthu|javusuthu]] || [[word:javusuju|javusuju]] || [[word:javusushu|javusushu]] || [[word:javusuku|javusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:javusuth|javusuth]] || [[word:javusuj|javusuj]] || [[word:javusush|javusush]] || [[word:javusu|javusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:javusuthul|javusuthul]] || [[word:javusujul|javusujul]] || [[word:javusushul|javusushul]] || [[word:javusukul|javusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:javusuthuthu|javusuthuthu]] || [[word:javusujuju|javusujuju]] || [[word:javusushushu|javusushushu]] || [[word:javusuku|javusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:javusuthun|javusuthun]] || [[word:javusujun|javusujun]] || [[word:javusushun|javusushun]] || [[word:javusukun|javusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:javusuthuoro|javusuthuoro]] || [[word:javusujuoro|javusujuoro]] || [[word:javusushuoro|javusushuoro]] || [[word:javusukuoro|javusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
